news.headline: Hong Kong woman, 86, falls to death while cleaning window in Discovery Bay
news.summary:
An 86‑year‑old woman died on Monday morning after falling from her flat while cleaning a window at a residential estate in Discovery Bay, an upscale seaside community in Hong Kong.

news.headline: Philippines earthquake kills 15, prompts tsunami fears: All to know
news.summary: The latest tremors come eight months after the Philippines suffered its strongest earthquake in 12 years.

news.headline: Maritime affairs minister contacts Dar, discusses release of Pakistani seamen held hostage by Somali pirates
